author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: DeepSource Anti-pattern + Style categories to zero (baseline: ~7.2k + 16 issues)

Post-alignment residue triaged by rule: repo-idiom conflicts suppressed with rationale, legitimate modernizations fixed in batches that stay green through the full gate suite (coverage 100%, jscpd, complexity twin-16); both categories read 0

message: 7.2k anti-pattern occurrences is default-ruleset noise territory — the bulk should vanish in pm-87bu alignment. Whatever survives alignment is by definition signal the repo's own ESLint does not cover; evaluate adopting the matching ESLint rule instead of one-off fixes so the two analyzers converge (never let DeepSource become a second source of truth that drifts from the repo gates).
